Off Calendar Mar-20-2020 Text Ruling

David P. Clisham, esq. (415-291-0855) of Clisham & Sortor for Petitioner via Court Call.
Ryan Selness,esq. (650-233-4006) of Pillsbury Winthrop Shaw Pittman LLP for Respondent via Court Call.
Marc H. Axelbaum, esq. (415-983-1967) of Pillsbury Winthrop Shaw Pittman LLP for Respondent.

ARGUED (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER GEORGE RUSH's Motion For Writ Of Mandate (CCP 1085), For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus (CCP 1094.5) And Damages (CCP 1095) is under submission.
